links.source_location: Located in Next.js public/ directory of AIRE platform; likely used as a UI asset for file references or upload indicators
SVG renders a document/file icon with folded top-right corner, 16x16 viewBox, gray fill (#666)
Path includes folded corner geometry at top-right (9.5,5 to 12.38,5 to 9.5,2.12) indicating a page-turn/folded corner motif
Path includes three horizontal line segments at y=5, y=8, y=11 representing text lines on the document
next.svg is included in the public/ directory of the AIRE platform Next.js app, typically used in default Next.js scaffolding
SVG file is the official Next.js wordmark/logo
AIRE platform is a Next.js application as stated in CLAUDE.md
SVG file contains a single path element forming the Vercel triangle/chevron mark
Presence in public/ directory suggests the AIRE Next.js app is deployed or associated with Vercel hosting
